name: Bitmapped
notes: Pnpm monorepo (Turborepo). Workspaces: packages/bitmapped (library, npm), apps/demo (Vite, port 5173), apps/docs (Next.js + Nextra, port 3000). Library versioning is managed by changesets — packages/bitmapped/CHANGELOG.md is auto-generated; do not edit manually. Root CHANGELOG.md is for project/app-level changes.
